items.statcast_observation: Maikel Garcia produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 105.4 mph at a 15.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the New York Yankees, KC 0, NYY 7. Noah Cameron led the night, working 5.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 1 walk. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 105.4 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Yankees Recap
